commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Feishu `tts.preserveText` option, uses it in reply dispatch to send text alongside voice media, and adds docs and dispatcher tests.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +151, Docs +4. Total +161 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. From source, current Feishu reply dispatch gates text delivery on `!hasVoiceMedia`, and voice detection treats `audioAsVoice` or native Ogg/Opus media as voice media; I did not run a live Feishu/Lark account in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - Two narrow file-level blockers can be repaired on the PR branch; maintainer acceptance of the feature remains a later review gate.

target.title: feat(feishu): add tts.preserveText to keep text alongside voice media
target.body:
## Summary

When TTS auto-reply is enabled on Feishu, text is unconditionally suppressed when voice media is present. This makes it impossible for users (especially children learning to read) to see the text while listening to the voice.

This PR adds a `tts.preserveText` config option (boolean, default `false` for backward compatibility). When set to `true`, text is delivered alongside voice media.

## Changes

- `extensions/feishu/src/config-schema.ts`: Add `preserveText` to `TtsOverrideSchema`
- `extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.ts`: Read config and conditionally skip text suppression
- `extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts`: Add 3 unit tests covering `preserveText=true`, default behavior, and native opus voice media

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: Feishu TTS auto-reply unconditionally suppresses text when voice media is present, making it impossible for users to read while listening.

- Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw development build with Feishu webhook channel configured.

- Exact steps or command run after this patch:
  1. Set `channels.feishu.tts.preserveText: true` in config
  2. Trigger an agent reply that generates both text and voice media
  3. Observe Feishu chat output

- Evidence after fix:
  Terminal output showing both `sendMessageFeishu` and `sendMediaFeishu` called with correct arguments:
  ```
  [Feishu] sendMessage: text="Hello world" to=oc_chat
  [Feishu] sendMedia: mediaUrl=https://example.com/voice.mp3 audioAsVoice=true to=oc_chat
  ```

- Observed result after fix:
  - Text message delivered successfully via `sendMessageFeishu`
  - Voice media delivered as audio bubble via `sendMediaFeishu`
  - Both messages visible in Feishu chat history

- What was not tested:
  - Lark domain (only tested Feishu)
  - Group chat scenarios (only tested P2P DM)

## Backward Compatibility

- Default `undefined`/`false` → existing behavior (suppress text when voice media present)
- Explicit `true` → new behavior (preserve text alongside voice)

## Configuration Example

```yaml
channels:
  feishu:
    tts:
      auto: always
      preserveText: true   # NEW: keep text when sending voice
```
target.author: khancold
